name: SevenSegment

unions.name: NumberOfDigits
unions.comment: Number of digits when rendering an integer with a seven-segment display. The number will be left padding to this value.

aliases.name: SevenSegment
aliases.comment:
A record of flags indicating which segments of a seven-segment display should be illuminated.

  - Segments prefixed with 'h' are horizontal segments.
  - Segments prefixed with 'v' are vertical segments.
aliases.type: { hTop : Basics.Bool, hMiddle : Basics.Bool, hBottom : Basics.Bool, vUpperLeft : Basics.Bool, vUpperRight : Basics.Bool, vLowerLeft : Basics.Bool, vLowerRight : Basics.Bool }

values.name: digits
values.type: { d0 : SevenSegment.SevenSegment, d1 : SevenSegment.SevenSegment, d2 : SevenSegment.SevenSegment, d3 : SevenSegment.SevenSegment, d4 : SevenSegment.SevenSegment, d5 : SevenSegment.SevenSegment, d6 : SevenSegment.SevenSegment, d7 : SevenSegment.SevenSegment, d8 : SevenSegment.SevenSegment, d9 : SevenSegment.SevenSegment }

values.name: fromInt
values.comment: Produce a list of `SevenSegment`s to display the value of the given integer (including a leading minus symbol if negative).

values.name: intView
values.comment: Render an integer using a seven-segment display

name: SevenSegment.Color

aliases.name: Color
aliases.comment:
A very minimal / lightweight Color representation that should be easily interoperable with other color libraries. This is exposed as a simple
type alias because

  - There should be no reason for this to change in the future based on how it is used in this library.
  - It is not intended to be a rich Api.
aliases.type: { red : Basics.Int, green : Basics.Int, blue : Basics.Int }

values.name: luminosity
values.comment: The luminosity (brightness) of a color as a value from 0..255.

values.name: toRGB
values.comment: Encode a color as an RGB string.

values.name: toRGBA
values.comment: Encode a color as an RGBA string.

name: SevenSegment.Config

values.name: backgroundColor
values.comment: Read the background color out of the Config.

values.name: foregroundColor
values.comment: Read the foreground color out of the Config.

values.name: includeBevel
values.comment: Read the includeBevel out of the Config.

values.name: init
values.comment: Default configuration for a red seven-segment display with a bevel. Specify the width in pixels. The display is roughly twice the width in height.

values.name: widthPixels
values.comment: Read the width in pixels out of the Config.

values.name: withColors
values.type: { foregroundColor : SevenSegment.Color.Color, backgroundColor : SevenSegment.Color.Color } -> SevenSegment.Config.Config -> SevenSegment.Config.Config
